goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'particular attraction'. Its name is called 'clare hall'.
Make sure you get 'phone number' and 'address'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'bishops stortford' and should leave on 'thursday'.
The train should go to 'cambridge' and should 'leave after 08:45'.
Make sure you get 'arrival time' and 'train ID'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a particular attraction. Its name is called clare hall
Make sure you get phone number and address
You are also looking for a train. The train should depart from bishops stortford and should leave on thursday
The train should go to cambridge and should leave after 08:45
Make sure you get arrival time and train ID
